CIML Meeting2001September 25, 2001

🇷🇺 Moscow, Russia

36th CIML Meeting — Minutes (EN, Bulletin)

Meeting DOI10.63493/meetings/ciml36
Meeting URNurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-36

Agenda

ItemTitleOutcome
1Approval of the minutes of the $ 3 5^{th} $ CIML MeetingAdopted
2Implementation of the decisions and resolutions of the Eleventh ConferenceDiscussed
3Reexamination of the 1999-2002 Action Plan and its extension to cover the period 2003-2004Discussed
4Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscussed
4.1New Members - Expected accessionsDiscussed
4.2Situation of certain MembersDiscussed
5Financial mattersDiscussed
5.1Adoption of the Auditor's report for 2000Adopted
5.2Examination of the financial situation for 2001 and 2002Discussed
6Presidential Council activitiesDiscussed
7The situation at the BIMLDiscussed
7.1BIML Staff - General situation - Renewal of the contract of Mr. SzilvassyDiscussed
7.2BIML activitiesDiscussed
8Technical activitiesDiscussed
8.1Work program of TCs/SCs andDiscussed
8.2Examination of the situation of certain TCs/SCs, if appropriateDiscussed
8.3Approval of draft RecommendationsAdopted
8.4Future development in TC/SC working methods and use of modern communication meansDiscussed
9OIML Certificate System for Measuring InstrumentsDiscussed
9.1General informationDiscussed
9.2New Recommendations applicable within the SystemDiscussed
9.3Plans for future developments (see also MAA below)Discussed
10Mutual Acceptance Arrangement (MAA)Discussed
11IQ mark for prepackaged goodsDiscussed
12Report on the Development Council meeting of 24 SeptemberDiscussed
13Liaisons with international and regional institutionsDiscussed
13.1Regional Legal Metrology Organizations (RLMOs)Discussed
13.2Other institutionsDiscussed
14Appointment of Honorary Members of the CommitteeDiscussed
15Future meetingsDiscussed
15.137th CIML Meeting (2002)Discussed
15.238th CIML Meeting (2003)Discussed
15.3Further meetingsDiscussed
16Other mattersDiscussed
17Adoption of decisionsAdopted
18ClosureDiscussed

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
